Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Sep-26-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Timothy E. Elliott, Esq. of WATT, TIEDER 623-7000, moving to be relieved as counsel for PLAINTIFF U.S. DOOR & HARDWARE, INC.

RULING:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Counsel submitted a copy of the filed declaration regarding service to the Court. THE COURT granted WATT, TIEDER, HOFFAR & FITZGERALD'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for PLAINTIFF U.S. DOOR & HARDWARE, INC. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/JLW)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Sep-25-2003 Continued To Sep-26-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Timothy E. Elliott, Esq. of WATT, TIEDER, HOFFAR 623-7000, moving to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff U.S. DOOR & HARDWARE, INC.

RULING:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT, having heard counsel's representation, continued WATT, TIEDER, HOFFAR & FITZGERALD'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel FOR PLAINTIFF U.S. DOOR & HARDWARE, INC. to September 26, 2003. (301/JLW/JU) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
